_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude
_meta.purpose: Hash-verified integrity layer for HUF corpus. Load AFTER HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json. Use to detect file corruption, unauthorized edits, or version drift across sessions.
_meta.protocol: Any AI loading the HUF context should: (1) Read HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json for concepts. (2) Read this file. (3) Spot-check 2-3 file hashes. If any hash mismatches, flag it and re-read the source file before proceeding.

canonical_value_checksums._note: These are deterministic checks on canonical values. An AI can recompute these from the FAST_REFRESH and verify no drift occurred during loading.

japan_flag_check.reason: Fukushima March 2011 but annual data shock absorbed by 2013-2014

uk_flag_check.NOT_approximate: Do not state 'approximately 3.0' — use exact values

tier_0_truth_sources._note: These files define canonical values. If they change, FAST_REFRESH must be updated.

tier_1_briefings._note: Session briefings containing analysis and findings. Authoritative for their scope.

briefings/EITT_Precedent_and_Lineage_for._note: ChatGPT-authored. 8-stage precedent chain, HIVIP naming, 6-level promotion ladder, contamination doctrine, 15-item methods status

briefings/EITT_Project_Arc_and_Contamina._note: ChatGPT-authored. 7-stage project arc, 3-path contamination doctrine, clean research principles

briefings/EITT_Nuclear_Assessment_and_St._note: ChatGPT-authored. Nuclear assessment, corridor prediction, prime-step staircase, 3-tier prediction stack

briefings/HUF_CHATGPT_BRIEFING_2026-04-1._note: ChatGPT handoff: refresh chain v3, codawork2026 consolidation, geochemistry, working example, talk deck, handouts

tier_2_deliverables._note: Documents built FROM tier 0/1 sources. If hash mismatches, rebuild from source, do not edit directly.
tier_2_deliverables._updated: 2026-04-17 — codawork2026/ consolidated package added, old drafts/codawork-2026/ paths archived

codawork2026/presentation/CoDaWork2026_H._note: v2 talk deck built 2026-04-17, 16 slides, Office 2013 compatible

codawork2026/extended/CoDaWork2026_Hando._note: 3pp general conference handout for advanced CoDa+time-series audience
4pp general conference handout bridging static geochemistry to EITT

for_any_ai: 1. Read HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json — this gives you every concept, name, number, formula
2. Read this file (HUF_INTEGRITY_MANIFEST.json) — this gives you hashes to verify against
3. Spot-check: pick 2-3 canonical_value_checksums and verify they match what you loaded
4. If building documents: read the relevant tier_1 briefing for full context
5. If editing documents: verify the file hash matches tier_2 before editing
6. After producing new canonical results: update FAST_REFRESH first, then rebuild deliverables
7. After rebuilding: recompute hashes and update this manifest
known_drift_patterns: EITT name mutates from 'Time' to 'Ternary' or 'Temporal' across sessions
Japan drift flag year drifts from 2013-2014 to 2011-2012 (narrative gravity toward event date)
Germany drift flag attributed to 2011 nuclear moratorium instead of 2023 final shutdown
UK flag values collapse from three specific values to 'approximately 3'
Arithmetic mean destruction percentage gets omitted when describing EITT
Chemistry proof details (4 lenses, pass rates) get simplified to just '500k data points'
Geochemistry anomaly count inflated from 1 (Foidite only) to 'several' or '2'
Experiment chain truncated — EXP-05b (real geochemistry, 40,666 rocks) gets omitted when listing experiments
codawork2026/ path reverts to old drafts/codawork-2026/ path — use codawork2026/ (top-level)
Working Example step count mutates from 10 to fewer — the Higgins Decomposition is exactly 10 steps
HIVIP/HIVP naming confusion — HIVP is the regression chain rule, HIVIP is the umbrella methodology. They are distinct. Do not merge or swap them

Nuclear staircase overclaim — prime-2 mechanism is structural identity (pairing energy), NOT a statistical correlation. Prime Z enrichment is DEAD (p=0.85). Stability corridor is corridor-level resolution only, not exact-Z prediction
Promotion ladder misuse — no concept climbs by improving one domain at cost of contaminating earlier DUTs. Anti-corruption rule is absolute
refresh_protocol.golden_rule: If a value in a document disagrees with HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json, the FAST_REFRESH wins. Always.

Includes the three layers (screwdriver/math book/alliance), invariants carried forward (6.02 dB, 115 Hz·m, Isotropic Principle, paired measurement, inert probe, GOV/CLS fork, Banach convergence/stationarity), and cross-reference map connecting every current-repo document to its RWA ancestor
